title: First Aid Kit List
scenario: Create a list of essential items for a first aid kit. The list should be concise and easy to read. It should include information on the types of wounds and injuries that each item can treat. Keep it under 200 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 200 words and uses bullet points.
Check if the text is clear, concise, and easy to read.
Check if the text includes the required information on first aid kit items.
